formulaScopes.title: Wheel-Load Computation Boundary
formulaScopes.notes: Formula list is enumerated by ID in docs/load-methodology.md. Equations land in that doc only after approval; until then approvedFormulaIds is empty and engines emit null numerics.

formulaScopes.title: Envelope Aggregation Boundary
formulaScopes.notes: Envelope shape is defined; aggregation rules and absolute-max conventions are gated behind explicit approval.
